attacking_style: Attacks near climb crests and false summits, timing moves to exploit terrain changes before descents. Prefers late-race aggression but struggles to sustain prolonged efforts.
team_tactics: Insufficient data across observations to establish clear team setup patterns.
terrain_preference: Technical climbing with false summits and transitions to descents where positioning advantages matter. Exposed on sustained steep gradients requiring extended power output.
vulnerability: Lacks sustained punch to maintain solo attacks on final climbs when repeatedly attempting moves. Cannot finish off attacks that require prolonged power above threshold.
key_patterns: Attacks near climb crests exploiting terrain features like false summits (2 observations)
Multiple attack attempts on final climbs without ability to make decisive move stick (2 observations)
Timing attacks at terrain transitions rather than raw power-based accelerations (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: showed tactical intelligence in Catalunya podium but Vuelta efforts lacked finishing power months later
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
